---
title: "&nbsp;"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

<div class = "row">
<div class = "col-md-6">

### **Si-Chong Chen (陈思翀)**<br>
#### **Professor in Ecology**<br>
[Wuhan Botanical Garden, Chinese Academy of Sciences](http://www.wbg.cas.cn/), Wuhan, P.R. China<br>
[Royal Botanic Gardens, Kew](http://www.kew.org/), Surrey, UK

<br>

#### Contact me: 

No. 201, Jiufeng 1st Road, East Lake High-tech Development Zone, Wuhan, P.R. China<br>
Email: [chensichong0528[a]gmail.com](mailto:chensichong0528@gmail.com)
</div>

<div class = "col-md-6">

<br>
[![](Pictures/XXX.JPG)](XXX.JPG){#id .class width=100% height=100%}

</div>
</div>

<hr>

#### Professional Experience


* 2021 -- \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ : Professor (Overseas High-level Talents Program)<br>
[Wuhan Botanical Garden, Chinese Academy of Sciences](http://www.wbg.cas.cn/)

* XXX -- XXX:         XXX <br>
                  Where XXX
                  
* XXX -- XXX:         XXX <br>
                  Where XXX

<hr>

#### Research interests

I work on the macroecological patterns in seed dispersal, seed predation, seed storage behaviours and relevant disciplines. My research aims to contribute to our understanding of seed ecology in three key ways:<br>

* by narrowing the gaps between data, intuitive ideas and theories;

* by enhancing the integration of replicated studies at a macro-ecological scale;

* by extending understanding from a local scale and a small number of species to a global scale spanning many biomes and taxonomic groups.

<hr>

#### Professional Services
**Editorial Board**<br>
[Methods in Ecology and Evolution](https://besjournals.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/hub/journal/2041210X/editorial-board/associate-editors#S) Associate Editor (2023-)<br>
[Oikos](http://www.oikosjournal.org/about-journal/editorial-board) Subject Editor (2020-)<br>
[Integrative Zoology](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/page/journal/17494877/homepage/editorialboard.html) Associate Editor (2022-)<br>
[Biodiversity Science 生物多样性](https://www.biodiversity-science.net/CN/column/column48.shtml) Editorial Board Member (2024-)<br>
[Chinese Journal of Plant Ecology 植物生态学报](https://www.plant-ecology.com/CN/column/column58.shtml) Editorial Board Member (2024-)<br>
[Plant Science Journal 植物科学学报](https://plantscience.cn/bianweihui) Editorial Board Member (2022-)<br>

<hr>

#### Research Interests
**Macroecology, Biogeography** 

* <p style="color:darkgreen">**Prospective students and postdocs are encouraged to read [our publications] and [contact me](mailto:chensichong0528@gmail.com) or the [lab members] before applying officially.** </p>
